InstructionData.Title: Rbt_Robot v0.1
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
#Robot Control Script 0.1 by Trante INIT: alias d_robot db alias r_battcharge r1 alias r_posx r2 alias r_varx r3 #variance alias r_posz r4 alias r_varz r5 #variance
#s d_robot Mode RobotMode.None
define c_HomeX 57 define c_HomeY 0 define c_HomeZ 41 define c_WorkX 50 define c_WorkY 0 define c_WorkZ 60
START: ls r_battcharge d_robot 0 ChargeRatio blt r_battcharge 0.70 RETURNBASE #skip next line
MOVETOWORK: s d_robot TargetX c_WorkX s d_robot TargetY c_WorkY s d_robot TargetZ c_WorkZ s d_robot Mode RobotMode.MoveToTarget CHECKCOORDS: l r_posx d_robot PositionX l r_posz d_robot PositionZ sub r_varx c_WorkX - r_posx sub r_varz c_WorkZ - r_posz abs r_varx r_varx abs r_varz r_varz bgt r_varx 2 CHECKCOORDS #if variance > 2 jump bgt r_varz 2 CHECKCOORDS #if variance > 2 jump j SHUTDOWN #for testing
#break out of loop if arrived #otherwise loop
j START
RETURNBASE: s d_robot TargetX c_HomeX s d_robot TargetY c_HomeY s d_robot TargetZ c_HomeZ s d_robot Mode RobotMode.MoveToTarget sleep 3 SHUTDOWN: s d_robot Mode RobotMode.Follow #s d_robot On 0 EOF:
